## Fees & Revenue

* * *

[Revenue by Protocol1848 trackedSubset of fees that the protocol collects for itself, usually going to the protocol treasury, the team, or distributed among token holders. This doesn't include any fees distributed to liquidity providers](https://defillama.com/revenue)

[Fees by Protocol2206 trackedTotal fees paid by users when using the protocol](https://defillama.com/fees)

[Holders Revenue by Protocol832 trackedSubset of revenue that is distributed to token holders by means of buyback and burn, burning fees or direct distribution to stakers](https://defillama.com/holders-revenue)

[Revenue by Chain98 trackedSubset of fees that the chain collects for itself](https://defillama.com/revenue/chains)

[Fees by Chain214 trackedTotal fees paid by users when using the chain](https://defillama.com/fees/chains)

[Earnings by Protocol1848 trackedNet revenue retained by the protocol after subtracting token incentives distributed to users. Calculated as Revenue minus Incentives (emissions paid out through liquidity mining, farming programs, or similar rewards). Reflects the actual economic value accrued to the protocol itself](https://defillama.com/earnings)

[App Revenue by Chain327 trackedSum of all revenue earned by the apps on the chain. Excludes stablecoins, liquid staking apps, and gas fees](https://defillama.com/app-revenue/chains)

[App Fees by Chain327 trackedSum of all fees paid by users when using the apps on the chain. Excludes stablecoins, liquid staking apps, and gas fees](https://defillama.com/app-fees/chains)

[P/F by Protocol361 trackedMarket cap / annualized fees](https://defillama.com/pf)

[P/S by Protocol321 trackedMarket cap / annualized revenue](https://defillama.com/ps)

[REV by Chain214 trackedSum of chain fees and MEV tips](https://defillama.com/rev/chains)
